name: Enable default permissions
description: Recover a blocked create/publish flow when validation reports no user or missing default permissions by enabling org-default permissions.
content_md: When validation fails with 'at least one user' or 'default permissions' errors, enable the org-default permissions checkbox (prefer the React setter) via the wizard.permissions_default bridge.
